caseStudy.title: DriveSoft — Reservation & Ticketing Platform for Srbija Tours
caseStudy.tagline: A production system that runs daily ticket sales and operations for an international bus carrier.
caseStudy.problem: Srbija Tours, an international bus carrier, ran reservations, ticketing and field operations across disconnected, mostly manual tools. They needed one system to sell tickets online, manage routes and passengers, validate tickets, handle payments and fiscal-legal receipts, and give office and field staff a single source of truth.
caseStudy.solution: I built DriveSoft end to end: a Laravel/MySQL backend exposing REST APIs, a React passenger-facing booking site, a React admin panel for operations, and React Native tools for field workers. It covers online reservations, passenger & route management, ticket generation with QR-code validation, payments with fiscal-receipt integration, and operational reporting.
architecture: Backend: Laravel + MySQL, REST APIs, Redis caching, queued background jobs
Frontends: React passenger booking site + React admin panel
Mobile: React Native tools for field workers (ticket validation on the move)
Integrations: online payments, fiscal-receipt (legal) integration, QR-code ticket validation
features: Role-based admin panel with operational reporting
React Native tools for on-the-road ticket validation
caseStudy.role: Sole full-stack developer. I own the architecture, the Laravel/MySQL backend, both React front-ends and the React Native tools — from database schema and API design through deployment — and I maintain and extend it in production.
caseStudy.result: Online reservations, ticketing and back-office operations now run through one maintained platform instead of scattered manual processes — a single source of truth for both the sales desk and field staff.

ai.title: AI-Assisted Development
ai.description: Shipping faster with AI tooling kept under senior engineering control.

howIWork.title: AI-accelerated development with senior engineering judgment
howIWork.subtitle: I use AI tools to move faster on development, refactoring, debugging and documentation. Architecture, business logic, validation and final code quality stay under my control — AI speeds up the work, it doesn't decide what ships.

review.title: Disciplined code review
review.description: Every change is read, understood and reviewed before it ships. AI speeds up exploration; it doesn't get a free pass into production.

prompting.title: Precise prompting
prompting.description: I scope problems clearly and direct AI tools deliberately — the same way I'd brief a teammate, with explicit constraints and intent.

testing.title: Verification & testing
testing.description: Generated code is verified against real behavior and covered by tests before it reaches users. Nothing ships unproven.

shipping.title: Faster, reviewable shipping
shipping.description: The result is quicker delivery with clean, maintainable, reviewable code — not throwaway output that someone has to rewrite later.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full-stack developer focused on real production systems and business logic.
about.bio: I build and maintain real production systems for booking, ticketing, operations and business automation. For 5+ years I've shipped end-to-end software for the transport industry — Laravel backends (reservations, payments, fiscalization, logistics), React / Next and React Native front-ends, and 10+ live WordPress sites. I'm comfortable taking ownership of an existing codebase, untangling real business logic, and delivering practical solutions that hold up in production — not just clean code in isolation. Currently full-time at Srbija Tours International, with freelance projects on the side. Remote-first, async, Git-based.
